content.en:
Time flies, and a million years have passed.

For such a long time, Ye Tian has been practicing here in the statue of Wanxiang, he mainly comprehends the many changes in the way of time, and occasionally also comprehends the many changes in the way of space.

The penance of the millions of years of cultivation has allowed him to master the many changes of more than 10 million spatial paths and more than 10 million changes of the time path, while he has not mastered many changes in other realms, after all, he is currently only concentrating on the many changes of the space path and the time path.

Other than that.

Ye Tian continued to use the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo to refine his control body, exhausting the power of the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo one by one, and his control body was already very close to the eighth-level control body.

But I have to admit that it is still very difficult to completely raise the body of control to level eight.

this day.

The strength of the half-tooth controller broke through, and he became a nine-domain level master, while Yanyan mastered the eight-domain level master.

If they created an Origin Control Technique, it would naturally be easy to break through to become a Realm-level Master.

However, even with the help of the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, it would take a long time for them to create the Origin Master, and this was the gap in understanding.

Ye Tian's own comprehension qualifications far surpassed them, and with the help of the secret of comprehension, he could quickly comprehend the many changes in the Dao, and he could quickly create the Origin Control Technique, but they couldn't do it, and they had to spend a lot of time to create it slowly.

And after Ye Tian had mastered more than 10 million changes in the Dao of Time and the Dao of Space, he was ready to combine the many changes in time and space and other Dao to create a more powerful Origin Control Technique.

Although he couldn't create a top-notch Origin Control Technique, a more powerful Origin Control Technique could still be created.

As a result, he will devote part of his time to creating this Origin Mastery Technique from now on.

Before I knew it, hundreds of thousands of years had passed.

On this day, a powerful Origin Control Technique was finally created by Ye Tian.

This Origin Control Technique combines many changes in the Dao of Time and the Dao of Space, as well as many changes in the Thunder Dao, Fire Dao and other Dao, and is named the Space-Time Rift Blade by him!

With the many changes of the way of time and space condensed into the blade of time and space, and then the speed of change of the way of thunder, coupled with the explosive power of the way of fire, they cooperate with each other to tear apart the enemy's body of control with one blow.

It can be said that the power of this Origin Control Technique is at least ten times more than that of Yan Explosion, but the consumption is also very large.

However, Ye Tian is not afraid of consumption!

He devoured the Black Silent Sea, and the last thing he feared was consumption, so he could infinitely cast the Space-Time Rift Blade.

With the creation of the space-time rift blade, Ye Tian's strength was infinitely close to the strength of the Five Realms-level Controller, as long as he raised his Control Body to the level of the eighth level, his strength would immediately break through to the combat power of the Five-Realm Controller.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to improve his control body, and he stayed with the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo, and at the same time urged the power of the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo to refine his control body.

In this way, he tempered 100,000 realm river years, and finally broke through by luck.

Rumble!!!!

The body of control has been improved from level seven to level eight, his physical fitness has skyrocketed a lot, and his strength has also skyrocketed a lot, directly making Ye Tian's strength reach the top combat power of the five realm-level controllers.

However, after reaching the eighth level of control body, he would be useless if he used the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo again.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At the moment, what is still of great use to him here is the statue of Wanxiang, and everything else is useless.

......

"Senior Brother Ye has become a Five Realms level master!"

The half-tooth controller and Yan Yan controller were shocked at this time, how long had it been, and Ye Tian had broken through to a level again.

From the Fourth Realm level to the Fifth Realm level, it is a hundred times more difficult than their breakthrough!

They thought that their strength would break through quickly, but they didn't expect Ye Tian's breakthrough to be fast!

In the past few years, the Half-Tooth Controller took the lead in creating a very ordinary Origin Control Technique, which can almost be regarded as the weakest Origin Control Technique, but it still made his strength step into the First Realm Controller.

In recent years, Ye Tian had been relatively low-key, so few people knew that his strength had reached the Five Realms level controller.

this day.

Ye Tian took some of the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo and brought it back to the Terran Race.

Of course, he only took away some very ordinary Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo, and these ordinary Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo were useless to both Yan Yan and Half Tooth Controllers.

And the human race has now given birth to a small number of Eternal Controllers, such as Ye Tian's family, who have recently stepped into the realm of Eternal Controllers under the cultivation of him at all costs.

Therefore, these ordinary Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo were also helpful to them.

That's why Ye Tian brought it back to the human race.

In the following years, Ye Tian occasionally went to other places to see, and he was not always on the side of the Wanxiang Statue, after all, his strength could not skyrocket in a short period of time.

If you want to be promoted from the strength of the Five Realms to the strength of the Six Realms Masters, the difficulty is still very huge, even with the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, the difficulty is still very terrifying, and the time spent has to be described as a hundred million realms of river years.

......

this day.

Ye Tian received a notice from Shizun, so he went to Wanyuan Mountain.

At this time, Ye Tian's four senior brothers and sisters also came to Wanyuan Mountain, and those official disciples also came, obviously there was something important.

"Master!"

Many disciples respectfully greeted the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master.

"It's all here!" Ten Elements Ancestor nodded lightly, and then said: "It's a good thing to call you back this time, you often say that I won't give you a chance." Now, I'm going to give a chance to each person, but it's up to you whether you can grasp it or not. "

"Master, I also have a chance?"

The third senior brother asked.

His strength is very strong, and except for a few great beings, he is almost invincible, and the opportunity to be useful to him is too rare.

"Yes!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

The black decay immediately became excited, he wanted to take that step too much, but unfortunately he couldn't cross it, he hadn't made any progress for so many years.

It would be great if the opportunity given by the Ten Elements Ancestor was sure that he would break the shackles.

Ye Tian was also very excited, after all, the Ten Elements Ancestor took the initiative to give the opportunity, except for the time when he had just apprenticed, this was the first time!

He was a little anxious about what his chances were.
